head.title: Zahid Ali - Expert Full Stack Developer & WordPress Specialist

meta.content: Zahid Ali offers expert full-stack web development, WordPress customization, and SEO content writing services. Hire for responsive, high-performance websites.
meta.name: description

meta.content: Zahid Ali, full stack developer, WordPress specialist, SEO content writer, web development, responsive web design, PSD to HTML, JavaScript, React, Node.js, PHP, Python, Bootstrap 5, WordPress optimization, front-end development, back-end development, freelance web developer, website optimization, SEO services
meta.name: keywords

meta.content: Zahid Ali - Expert Full Stack Developer & WordPress Specialist
Hire Zahid Ali for top-tier full-stack web development, WordPress customization, and SEO content writing. Specializing in responsive, high-performance websites.
Zahid Ali - Expert Full Stack Developer & WordPress Specialist
meta.name: twitter:title

meta.content: Discover Zahid Ali’s expertise in full-stack web development, WordPress customization, and SEO content writing for responsive, optimized websites.
meta.name: twitter:description

head.script: { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "Person", "name": "Zahid Ali", "jobTitle": "Full Stack Web Developer, WordPress Specialist, SEO Content Writer", "url": "https://www.fiverr.com/engineerzaj", "email": "Zahidali9028@gmail.com", "image": "https://fiverr-res.cloudinary.com/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto,t_profile_original/v1/attachments/profile/photo/1c75d6456d6c49847cf2a8668e093df3-1749220424659/84c6360a-8cf9-47c0-a2f1-c8297df7a1e6.jpg", "sameAs": [ "https://www.linkedin.com/in/zahidali9028", "https://www.fiverr.com/engineerzaj", "https://twitter.com/zahidali9028" ], "description": "Zahid Ali is an expert Full Stack Web Developer and WordPress Specialist with over 5 years of experience in responsive web design, SEO content writing, and custom development solutions." }

{ "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "LocalBusiness", "name": "Zahid Ali Freelance Services", "image": "https://fiverr-res.cloudinary.com/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto,t_profile_original/v1/attachments/profile/photo/1c75d6456d6c49847cf2a8668e093df3-1749220424659/84c6360a-8cf9-47c0-a2f1-c8297df7a1e6.jpg", "url": "https://www.fiverr.com/engineerzaj", "email": "Zahidali9028@gmail.com", "description": "Freelance web development and SEO content writing services by Zahid Ali, specializing in responsive websites and WordPress solutions.", "sameAs": [ "https://www.linkedin.com/in/zahidali9028", "https://www.fiverr.com/engineerzaj", "https://twitter.com/zahidali9028" ] }
head.b:skin: :root{--primary-color:#4CAF50;--secondary-color:#2D2D2D;--accent-color:#0288D1;--background-color:#F8FAFC;--card-background:#FFF;--shadow:0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);--border-radius:12px;--transition:all 0.3s ease-in-out}*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{font-family:Inter,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;line-height:1.8;color:var(--secondary-color);background-color:var(--background-color);overflow-x:hidden}.container{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px}header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary-color),var(--accent-color));color:#FFF;padding:40px 20px;text-align:center;border-radius:0 0 var(--border-radius) var(--border-radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}.profile-image{width:160px;height:160px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:4px solid #FFF;margin-bottom:15px;transition:var(--transition)}.profile-image:hover{transform:scale(1.1);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}.profile-name{font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:700;margin:10px 0}.profile-title{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:400;margin:5px 0}.profile-contact{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px}.profile-contact a{color:#FFF;text-decoration:none;font-size:1rem;padding:8px 16px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);transition:var(--transition)}.profile-contact a:hover{background:#FFF;color:var(--primary-color)}section{margin:40px 0;padding:30px;background:var(--card-background);border-radius:var(--border-radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow);transition:var(--transition)}section:hover{transform:translateY(-5px)}section h2{font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--secondary-color);border-bottom:3px solid var(--primary-color);padding-bottom:10px;margin-bottom:20px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase}section h3{font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--secondary-color);margin:15px 0 10px;font-weight:500}section p,section li{font-size:1rem;color:#444;margin:8px 0}section ul{list-style-type:disc;padding-left:25px;margin:15px 0}section a{color:var(--primary-color);text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;transition:var(--transition)}section a:hover{color:var(--accent-color);text-decoration:underline}.projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:20px;margin-top:20px}.project-card{background:#F5F5F5;padding:20px;border-radius:var(--border-radius);transition:var(--transition)}.project-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}.project-card img{width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:var(--border-radius);margin-bottom:15px}.testimonial{border-left:4px solid var(--primary-color);padding-left:20px;margin:15px 0}.testimonial p{font-style:italic}.testimonial cite{display:block;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--primary-color);margin-top:10px}.iframe-container iframe{width:100%;height:450px;border:none;border-radius:var(--border-radius);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}footer{text-align:center;padding:20px;background:var(--secondary-color);color:#FFF;margin-top:40px}footer a{color:var(--primary-color);text-decoration:none;transition:var(--transition)}footer a:hover{color:var(--accent-color)}@media screen and (max-width:768px){.container{padding:15px}.profile-image{width:120px;height:120px}.profile-name{font-size:1.8rem}.profile-title{font-size:1.1rem}.profile-contact{flex-direction:column;gap:10px}section h2{font-size:1.5rem}section h3{font-size:1.1rem}.iframe-container iframe{height:350px}}@media screen and (max-width:480px){.profile-image{width:100px;height:100px}.profile-name{font-size:1.5rem}.profile-title{font-size:0.95rem}section h2{font-size:1.3rem}section p,section li{font-size:0.9rem}.iframe-container iframe{height:300px}}@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}section{animation:fadeIn 0.5s ease-in-out}

header.p: Expert Full Stack Developer & WordPress Specialist

section.p: I’m Zahid Ali, an expert full-stack web developer and WordPress specialist with over 5 years of experience in crafting responsive, high-performance websites. My expertise includes front-end and back-end development, SEO content writing, and WordPress optimization. I deliver pixel-perfect, user-centric solutions tailored to client needs, ensuring seamless functionality and modern design.
Looking for a custom website, WordPress overhaul, or SEO-optimized content to boost your online presence? Hire me to transform your vision into reality!

ul.li: Front-End Development: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Vue.js, Bootstrap 5, Tailwind CSS
Back-End Development: Node.js, Express, PHP, Python (Django, Flask), Java, C++
CMS Expertise: WordPress theme/plugin development, Shopify, WooCommerce
Design Conversion: PSD, XD, Figma to responsive HTML/CSS, pixel-perfect implementation
SEO & Content: On-page SEO, keyword research, SEO content writing, technical SEO
Tools & Platforms: Git, Webpack, Docker, AWS, Firebase

article.p: Develop modern, responsive, and scalable websites using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and PHP. From landing pages to web apps, I deliver tailored solutions. Hire me.
Create engaging, SEO-optimized blog posts and articles to improve Google rankings and drive organic traffic. Hire me.
Transform PSD, XD, or Figma designs into responsive, pixel-perfect HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap 5 websites with cross-browser compatibility. Hire me.
Develop custom WordPress themes/plugins, fix errors, and optimize for speed and SEO. Hire me.
Developed a responsive e-commerce platform using React, Node.js, and WooCommerce, featuring secure payment integration and SEO optimization.
Converted a Figma design to a responsive HTML/CSS website with animations and WordPress integration for a freelance designer.
Built a WordPress-based blog with custom themes, SEO-optimized content, and performance improvements, increasing traffic by 30%.
"Zahid delivered a stunning, SEO-optimized website that significantly boosted our traffic and conversions!"
"Zahid’s WordPress expertise and quick turnaround fixed our site issues and improved our Google rankings."

footer.p: © 2025 Zahid Ali. All rights reserved. | Hire Me on Fiverr | Contact Me | Sitemap
